caption: A man with a shaved head and a blue t-shirt stands behind a podium in front of a blue and black branded backdrop. He is wearing a white lanyard around his neck and is gesturing with his hands as he speaks. The backdrop features repeating patterns of the text "has geek" and "#### rootconf". A laptop sits on the podium in front of him. As the sequence progresses, the man continues to speak and gesture, moving his hands and changing his facial expressions. He leans slightly forward and shifts his weight, maintaining his position behind the laptop. The lighting is consistent across the scene, highlighting the blue hues of his shirt and the background banners.
